name: Can a small business compete for Siri results without a big SEO budget?
description: Yes. Small businesses can win with accurate data and focused, high-quality answer pages.

mainEntity.name: Can a small business compete for Siri results without a big SEO budget?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, but the priorities are different. For a small business, accurate local data and a few strong answer pages often beat a large content project. If you are short on budget, focus on the pages and listings that directly answer customer questions in your target cities.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Small businesses can win with accurate data and focused, high-quality answer pages.
